plan.motiv_5: "Almost. Just a few left. You're nearly there."
plan.motiv_6: "You're done. Now get some good sleep."

pricing.title:
Simple.

The way it should be.
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Pay only when you need more.
pricing.desc_free: To get started. The plan you need, without paying anything.
pricing.desc_pro: Real personalization and studying from your own notes.
pricing.features_free: Automatic AI plan|Checkable visual plan|Share plan as a link|Focus mode (Pomodoro)|1 exam at a time
pricing.features_pro: Everything in Free|Custom time blocks|AI chat adjustments|Upload notes (PDF, photo)|Practice questions|Mock exam|Multiple exams
pricing.features_plus: Everything in Pro|Audio summary of your notes|Visual mind map|Chat with your notes|Study groups|Google Calendar integration
pricing.guarantee_title: No commitment. Cancel whenever you want.
pricing.guarantee_body: If Candil isn't for you, cancel from your account in two clicks. No questions, no hassle.

meta.title: Candil — Your AI study plan

practica.title: Practice what you studied
practica.locked_pitch: Candil builds questions and a full mock exam from your topics, so you arrive knowing what they'll ask.

plus.title: Plus tools
plus.locked_pitch: Visual mind map, chat with your notes and audio summary to review on the go.

landing.hero_title:
The plan you need,

when you need it most.
landing.hero_sub: Tell us your exam, your schedule and what you have to study. Candil builds the plan. You just study.
landing.why_body: We're not a productivity app. We're that friend who already passed, who knows exactly what you have, how much time is left, and how to distribute it so you make it.
landing.steps_sub: No complications. In under two minutes your plan is ready to check off.
landing.step1_desc: Subject, topics, exam type and date. If you already know some topics, mark them. Candil discounts them.
landing.step2_desc: How many hours you have per day. If you work Saturdays until 3pm, that too. The plan adapts to your life, not the other way around.
landing.step3_desc: Your plan appears with blocks, schedules and breaks. You check off as you go. Candil is with you every step.
landing.quote: "There's a moment when it's just you and your notes. Candil is there."
landing.feat1_desc: Distributes topics by their weight in the exam, your available hours and your energy. It's not a calendar — it's a plan that thinks.
landing.feat2_desc: You work Saturdays until 3pm, have class on Wednesday, a commitment on Sunday. Candil knows and distributes accordingly.
landing.feat3_desc: "Move digestive to Sunday" or "I have two extra hours on Saturday". The AI reorganizes the plan instantly, without starting over.
landing.feat4_desc: Upload your PDFs or photos of notes. Candil generates summaries, practice questions and mind maps from what you already have.
landing.pricing_sub: Start for free. Pay only when you need more.
landing.price_free_desc: To get started. The plan you need, without paying anything.
landing.price_free_features: Automatic AI plan|Checkable visual plan|Share plan as a link|Reminders|1 exam at a time
landing.price_pro_desc: Real personalization and studying from your own notes.
landing.price_pro_features: Everything in Free|Custom days and schedules|AI chat adjustments|Upload notes (PDF, photo)|Practice questions|Mock exam|Multiple exams
landing.price_plus_features: Everything in Pro|Audio summary of your notes|Visual mind map|Chat with your notes|Study buddy mode|Study groups|Google Calendar integration
landing.cta_sub: Build your plan now. In two minutes you'll know exactly what to study and when.
